title: strategy_006_donchian_breakout_obv_confirmation
author: manual-transcript-drop
summary_bullets: STRATEGY: Donchian Channel Breakout with OBV Volume Confirmation ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Breakout/expansion after consolidation TYPE: Breakout/momentum CONCEPT: Classic turtle trading breakout adapted for crypto.
Price breaking the 20-period Donchian high/low signals a potential new trend.
OBV confirmation ensures the breakout has real volume behind it, filtering fake breakouts.
ADX rising confirms momentum is building.
Exit uses a shorter 10-period Donchian to capture the meat of the move without giving back too much.

INDICATORS USED: - Donchian Channels (period 20) - breakout entry signal - Donchian Channels (period 10) - exit signal (shorter period) - OBV - volume confirmation (OBV must be above its own 20-period SMA) - ADX (period 14) - rising ADX confirms building momentum - ATR (period 14) - position sizing and initial stop ENTRY LONG: 1.
Price closes above 20-period Donchian Channel high (new 20-bar high) 2.
OBV > SMA(OBV, 20) (volume is supporting the move) 3.
ADX is rising (current ADX > ADX from 3 bars ago) ENTRY SHORT: 1.

extracted_rules: ADX is rising EXIT RULES: - Primary exit long: Price touches 10-period Donchian low (shorter channel catches trend end faster) - Primary exit short: Price touches 10-period Donchian high - Initial stop loss: 2.0x ATR(14) from entry - No take profit target (let winners run, Donchian exit handles it) - Max hold time: 50 candles (200 hours on 4h) RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 1% of account - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - If breakout candle is larger than 3x ATR, skip (overextended en

strategy_components.description: STRATEGY: Donchian Channel Breakout with OBV Volume Confirmation ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Breakout/expansion after consolidation TYPE: Breakout/momentum CONCEPT: Classic turtle trading breakout ada
Price breaking the 20-period Donchian high/low signals a potential new trend.
OBV confirmation ensures the breakout has real volume behind it, filtering fake breakouts.
ADX rising confirms momentum is building.

INDICATORS USED: - Donchian Channels (period 20) - breakout entry signal - Donchian Channels (period 10) - exit signal (shorter period) - OBV - volume confirmation (OBV must be above its own 20-period SMA) - ADX (period

ADX is rising EXIT RULES: - Primary exit long: Price touches 10-period Donchian low (shorter channel catches trend end faster) - Primary exit short: Price touches 10-period Donchian high - Initial stop loss: 2.0x ATR(14)
The problem with breakout strategies is false breakouts - OBV and ADX filters address this directly.
Using a shorter exit channel (10 vs 20) is the key insight from turtle trading: you want a more sensitive exit to protect profits while keeping a wider entry to avoid noise.
Crypto’s trending nature makes breakout strategies particularly effective.

explicit_conditions: ADX is rising EXIT RULES: - Primary exit long: Price touches 10-period Donchian low (shorter channel catches trend end faster) - Primary exit short: Price touches 10-period Donchian high - Initial stop loss: 2.0x ATR(14) from entry - No take profit target (let winners run, Donchian exit handles it) - Max hold time: 50 candles (200 hours on 4h) RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 1% of account - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - If breakout candle is larger than 3x ATR, skip (overextended en
